task.role: You are a Senior Node.js Engineer with expertise in server-side JavaScript and APIs. Implement Task 20 with production-quality code.

context.overview: Implement Discord, Email, and Webhook services with Effect composability
context.background: This task is part of a larger project. Key resources: - PRD: .tasks/docs/prd.txt (full requirements and architecture) - Related tasks: 19 - Infrastructure config: Check ConfigMaps for connection strings

requirements.description:
1. Create DiscordService for webhook delivery
2. Implement EmailService with SMTP support
3. Add WebhookService with HMAC signature verification
4. Use Effect.all for parallel delivery testing
5. Implement unified error handling across channels

constraints.constraint: Match existing codebase patterns and conventions
Create PR with atomic, well-described commits
Include unit tests for new functionality
PR title format: feat(task-20): Multi-Channel Integration Services (Nova - Bun/Elysia+Effect)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All requirements from task description implemented
Code follows project conventions and style guide
All channel services deliver notifications successfully, error handling consistent across channels, parallel testing works

deliverables.deliverable: Unit tests covering new code paths
